mapper.sql: id, statistics_date, daily_sales, daily_order_count, daily_new_users, daily_completed_orders, daily_cancelled_orders, daily_avg_order_amount, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_statistics ( statistics_date, daily_sales, daily_order_count, daily_new_users, daily_completed_orders, daily_cancelled_orders, daily_avg_order_amount, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{statisticsDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{dailySales,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dailyOrderCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dailyNewUsers,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dailyCompletedOrders,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dailyCancelledOrders,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dailyAvgOrderAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE daily_statistics
statistics_date = #{statisticsDate,jdbcType=DATE},
daily_sales = #{dailySales,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
daily_order_count = #{dailyOrderCount,jdbcType=BIGINT},
daily_new_users = #{dailyNewUsers,jdbcType=BIGINT},
daily_completed_orders = #{dailyCompletedOrders,jdbcType=BIGINT},
daily_cancelled_orders = #{dailyCancelledOrders,jdbcType=BIGINT},
daily_avg_order_amount = #{dailyAvgOrderAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM daily_statistics WHERE statistics_date BETWEEN #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE} ORDER BY statistics_date ASC
